$schema: Golden parana references — hand-checked against Drik Panchang. When you add a row: query https://www.drikpanchang.com/fasts/ekadashi-parana.html for the city+date, transcribe verbatim, record the URL or screenshot. Tolerance: ±2 minutes (matches our ±0.5° Sun / ~0.01° tithi-boundary accuracy). NOTE: This file is NOT user-facing; the rule 'no competitor references in public content' applies to marketing/articles, not internal test fixtures. References to drikpanchang.com remain in test-only paths.

cases.label: Seattle Parama Ekadashi 2026
